metadata.note: Includes 15 base session archive tickets (026-040) + 17 enhancement tickets (027b-038d) + 15 Einstein integration tickets (028a-028o including 028k and 028l) + 4 learning architecture expansion tickets (029c-029f)

tickets.title: Baseline Measurement & Corpus Capture
tickets.description: Establish baseline performance metrics and capture 100+ real event corpus

tickets.title: Setup Go Module & Directory Structure
tickets.description: Initialize Go module with standard project layout

tickets.title: Implement STDIN Timeout Reading
tickets.description: Timeout-protected STDIN reader with 5s default (fixes M-6)

tickets.title: Parse ToolEvent JSON Schema
tickets.description: Parse PreToolUse/PostToolUse event JSON from STDIN

tickets.title: Load Routing Schema JSON
tickets.description: Load and parse routing-schema.json with tier definitions

tickets.title: Read Current Tier from Filesystem
tickets.description: Read ~/.gogent/current-tier with fallback to external

tickets.title: Config Circular Dependency Tests
tickets.description: Test config loading with circular dependencies (deferred from Week 1)

tickets.title: Parse Task Input from tool_input
tickets.description: Extract model, prompt, subagent_type from Task tool_input

tickets.title: XDG-Compliant Path Resolution
tickets.description: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR > XDG_CACHE_HOME > ~/.cache/gogent (fixes M-2)

tickets.title: Tool Permission Check
tickets.description: Check if tool allowed for current tier

tickets.title: Hook Response JSON Output
tickets.description: Generate JSON responses with decision, reason, hookSpecificOutput

tickets.title: Capture Real Event Corpus
tickets.description: Capture 100+ real PreToolUse/PostToolUse events (addresses C-3)

tickets.title: Test Event Parsing with Real Events
tickets.description: Verify event parsing handles production corpus

tickets.title: Implement Override Flags and XDG Paths
tickets.description: Parse --force-tier and --force-delegation flags, implement XDG-compliant path resolution

tickets.title: Log Routing Violations to JSONL
tickets.description: Append violations to routing-violations.jsonl (fixes M-5)

tickets.title: Override Flag Integration Test
tickets.description: Test override flags with violations logging

tickets.title: Detect Agent from Prompt Patterns
tickets.description: Parse 'AGENT: <agent-id>' from prompt field

tickets.title: Map Agent to Subagent Type
tickets.description: Load agent_subagent_mapping from routing-schema.json

tickets.title: Tier Permission Check (allowed_tools)
tickets.description: Verify tool against tier.allowed_tools list

tickets.title: Agent Permission Check
tickets.description: Load agent tool restrictions from agents-index.json

tickets.title: Unified Permission Validator
tickets.description: Combine tier + agent permission checks (fixes M-1)

tickets.title: Permission Validation Integration Test
tickets.description: End-to-end permission validation test

tickets.title: Read Delegation Ceiling from .gogent/max_delegation
tickets.description: Read max delegation tier with external fallback

tickets.title: Validate Model Against Agents Index
tickets.description: Verify requested model matches agent.yaml tier

tickets.title: Validate Tool Permissions for Subagent Type
tickets.description: Check if tool allowed for subagent_type

tickets.title: Delegation Ceiling Enforcement
tickets.description: Block Task if requested tier exceeds max_delegation

tickets.title: Subagent_type Validation
tickets.description: Verify subagent_type matches agent_subagent_mapping (fixes M-3)

tickets.title: Task Validation Tests
tickets.description: Comprehensive Task validation test suite

tickets.title: Wire Validation Orchestrator
tickets.description: Combine all validators into single orchestrator with priority ordering

tickets.title: Build gogent-validate CLI
tickets.description: Build complete validation hook binary

tickets.title: Parse SessionEnd Event
tickets.description: Parse SessionEnd event with session_id and transcript_path

tickets.title: Collect Session Metrics
tickets.description: Count tool calls, errors, violations from log files

tickets.title: Implement ParseTranscript() for Semantic Analysis
tickets.description: Parse JSONL session transcript to extract tool events

tickets.title: Implement AnalyzeToolDistribution()
tickets.description: Analyze tool usage patterns from parsed transcript to understand session characteristics

tickets.title: Implement DetectPhases() for Session Characterization
tickets.description: Detect session phases (discovery, implementation, debugging) using sliding window analysis of tool distribution

tickets.title: Generate Handoff Document
tickets.description: Create last-handoff.md with metrics and context

tickets.title: Build gogent-archive CLI
tickets.description: Create CLI entry point for SessionEnd hook that orchestrates handoff generation

tickets.title: Validate Metrics Parity (Bash vs Go)
tickets.description: Verify Go metrics collection matches bash hook implementation exactly

tickets.title: Implement Artifact Archival in Go
tickets.description: Move pending learnings and violations to session-archive/ after handoff generation

tickets.title: Hook Registration & Deployment
tickets.description: Build script, hook configuration, and integration testing for gogent-archive deployment

tickets.title: Installation & PATH Configuration
tickets.description: Makefile install target and PATH configuration documentation

tickets.title: Context Loading Compatibility Test
tickets.description: Verify load-routing-context.sh hook can parse Go-generated markdown

tickets.title: Sharp Edge Schema Alignment
tickets.description: Document SharpEdge JSON schema and create validation function

tickets.title: Implement Git Info Collection
tickets.description: Replace collectGitInfo() stub with actual git command execution

tickets.title: Error Recovery & Fallback
tickets.description: Wrapper script that falls back to bash hook if Go CLI fails

tickets.title: JSONL History Querying CLI
tickets.description: Add subcommands to gogent-archive for querying handoff history

tickets.title: Handoff Generation Metrics
tickets.description: Log handoff generation performance metrics for observability

tickets.title: Handoff Schema Versioning
tickets.description: Implement backward-compatible schema migration for handoff JSONL

tickets.title: Integration Tests for Session Handoff
tickets.description: End-to-end integration test suite for full handoff workflow

tickets.title: Deployment Runbook
tickets.description: Step-by-step deployment and rollback procedures for gogent-archive cutover

tickets.title: ADR: JSONL Handoff Format
tickets.description: Architecture Decision Record documenting rationale for dual JSONL + Markdown format

tickets.title: Implement GenerateAdaptiveHandoff()
tickets.description: Generate adaptive handoff document that changes format based on session characteristics

tickets.title: Implement DetectWorkInProgress()
tickets.description: Detect if session ended mid-task by identifying the last Edit/Write operation and extracting context

tickets.title: Implement GenerateResumeGuidance()
tickets.description: Generate actionable resume guidance based on WIP context, pending learnings, and violations

tickets.title: Unified Sharp Edge Schema & Query API
tickets.description: Extend SharpEdge schema with severity, resolution tracking, and create Query API for agentic retrieval

tickets.title: User Intent Capture Schema & Storage
tickets.description: Create UserIntent artifact type for capturing user decisions, preferences, and intent during sessions

tickets.title: CLI Subcommands for Sharp Edges & User Intents
tickets.description: Add sharp-edges and user-intents subcommands to gogent-archive CLI for querying learning artifacts

tickets.title: Expand Handoff Schema for Decisions/Preferences/Performance
tickets.description: Extend HandoffArtifacts struct to capture decisions, preferences, and performance metrics

tickets.title: CLI Query Subcommands for Extended Artifacts
tickets.description: Extend gogent-archive CLI with decisions, preferences, performance subcommands for querying learning artifacts

tickets.title: Go Query API for Agentic Retrieval
tickets.description: Create programmatic Go API for Claude agents to query decisions, preferences, and performance metrics

tickets.title: Weekly Learning Aggregation CLI
tickets.description: Create gogent-aggregate CLI for weekly rollup of learning artifacts when files exceed size threshold

tickets.title: Format Violations Summary
tickets.description: Parse routing-violations.jsonl and format top 10 for handoff

tickets.title: Cluster Violations by Type
tickets.description: Group violations by type (subagent_type_mismatch, delegation_ceiling, etc.) to identify systemic patterns instead of showing flat list

tickets.title: Cluster Violations by Agent
tickets.description: Group violations by agent name to identify which agents have configuration issues

tickets.title: Analyze Violation Temporal Trends
tickets.description: Detect if violation rate is improving or worsening during session by analyzing timestamps

tickets.title: Archive Session Files
tickets.description: Copy transcript, move learnings/violations to archive

tickets.title: Session Archive Integration Test
tickets.description: End-to-end test of session archive workflow

tickets.title: Build gogent-archive CLI
tickets.description: Build session-archive hook binary

tickets.title: Parse PostToolUse Event
tickets.description: Parse PostToolUse events with tool_response

tickets.title: Failure Detection Logic
tickets.description: Detect failures from success flags, exit codes, error patterns

tickets.title: Consecutive Failure Tracking
tickets.description: Track failures per file within 5-minute sliding window

tickets.title: Track Failures by File + Error Type
tickets.description: Refine failure tracking to use file + error_type composite key instead of file-only, preventing false positives

tickets.title: Extract Function Name from Stack Traces (Optional)
tickets.description: Parse stack traces to extract function context, further refining failure tracking from file+error to file+error+function

tickets.title: Sharp Edge Capture
tickets.description: Write sharp edges to pending-learnings.jsonl at threshold

tickets.title: Extract 5-Line Code Context Window
tickets.description: Extract 5-line code context window around error location to provide visual context in sharp edges

tickets.title: Log Attempted Changes from Tool Input
tickets.description: Capture what was attempted during tool failures by extracting old_string→new_string from Edit, content preview from Write, and commands from Bash

tickets.title: Hook Response Generation
tickets.description: Generate blocking/warning/pass-through responses based on count

tickets.title: Load and Index Sharp-Edges YAML
tickets.description: Load sharp-edges.yaml files from all agent directories and build searchable index for pattern matching

tickets.title: Implement Pattern Similarity Matching
tickets.description: Match current sharp edge against indexed templates using multi-signal similarity scoring

tickets.title: Inject Remediation Suggestions in Blocking Response
tickets.description: Enhance GenerateBlockingResponse() to include matched patterns and remediation suggestions from sharp-edges.yaml

tickets.title: Sharp Edge Integration Tests
tickets.description: Test complete sharp edge detection workflow

tickets.title: Build gogent-sharp-edge CLI
tickets.description: Build sharp-edge-detector hook binary

tickets.title: Baseline Re-measurement (Post-Migration)
tickets.description: Re-run baseline benchmarks to measure performance gains from Go migration

tickets.title: Regression: Validate Hook Integration
tickets.description: Test validate-routing.sh can invoke gogent-validate binary

tickets.title: Regression: Archive Hook Integration
tickets.description: Test session-archive.sh can invoke gogent-archive binary

tickets.title: Regression: Sharp Edge Hook Integration
tickets.description: Test sharp-edge-detector.sh can invoke gogent-sharp-edge binary

tickets.title: End-to-End Production Simulation
tickets.description: Simulate production workflow with real corpus events

tickets.title: Deployment Readiness Checklist
tickets.description: Final verification of migration readiness

tickets.title: Performance Comparison Report
tickets.description: Generate comprehensive comparison of Python vs Go performance

tickets.title: User Intent Capture Hook
tickets.description: PostToolUse hook to capture user intents from AskUserQuestion responses

tickets.title: Intent Classification & Keyword Extraction
tickets.description: Automatic classification and keyword extraction for user intents

tickets.title: Weekly Intent Summary & Preference Drift Detection
tickets.description: Integrate intent patterns into weekly aggregation with drift detection

tickets.title: Intent Outcome Tracking
tickets.description: Track whether user intents were honored during session
